channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: These 5 clever mapping upstarts do what Google Maps can’t
item.description: Look, Google Maps is fine. It’s arguably even great—probably one of the most-opened apps on lots of our phones and absolutely one of the most indispensable.
item.dc:creator: JR Raphael, Fast Company

item.title: GitHub is making its AI programming Copilot free for VS Code developers
item.description: Free version of GitHub Copilot is now available to all developers in VS Code, but there are some restrictions.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Amazon workers strike at multiple facilities as Teamsters seek labor contract
item.description: Workers at seven Amazon facilities went on strike Thursday, an effort by the Teamsters to pressure the e-commerce company for a labor agreement during a key shopping period.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Improved Meta Ray-Ban smart glasses could land in 2025 – with a much requested upgrade
item.description: Meta’s Ray-Ban smart glasses could get a much requested display upgrade – but these aren’t Orion yet.
item.dc:creator: hamish.hector@futurenet.com (Hamish Hector), TechRadar

item.title: Unlocking AI's Potential: From Experimentation to Adoption
item.description: IDC's Chief Research Officer, Meredith Whalen, shares insights on the current state of generative artificial intelligence (genAI) and its adoption in organizations.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: La mitad de las empresas españolas considera que sus datos están optimizados para la IA
item.description: A nivel global, dos tercios (65%) de las empresas afirman que sus datos están total o mayoritariamente optimizados para la era de la inteligencia artificial (IA), mientras que en España esta cifra se reduce al 55%.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Ireland embraced data centers that the AI boom needs. Now they're consuming too much of its energy
item.description: Dozens of massive data centers are consuming more electricity than all of the urban homes in Ireland and starting to wear out the warm welcome that brought them here.
item.dc:creator: Matt O'Brien, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Blinken's Final Trip to the UN: What to Expect
item.description: Secretary of State Antony Blinken's final trip to the United Nations, focusing on artificial intelligence and Sudan, amid a divided Security Council.
item.dc:creator: Edith M. Lederer And Matthew Lee, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Musk pressure campaign on CR highlights his growing influence
item.description: Elon Musk’s aggressive push against a stopgap measure to prevent a government shutdown received mixed reactions from House Republicans, even as it seemingly ended in success with President-elect Trump and Vice President-elect Vance announcing their own opposition to the measure.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Go 1.24 brings full support for generic type aliases
item.description: Go 1.24, a planned update to Google‘s popular open-source programming language, has reached the release candidate stage.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Creature Commandos episode 4 reveals the DCU's Justice League for the first time, but its showrunner has a warning for fans who might 'infer' anything from it
item.description: Creature Commandos' fourth episode just gave us our first look at the DCU's Justice League, but not in the way you'd expect.
item.dc:creator: tom.power@futurenet.com (Tom Power), TechRadar

item.title: Data on animal movements help Hungarian researchers create a swarm of autonomous drones
item.description: BUDAPEST, Hungary (AP) — Moving in a dense cloud, like throngs of people walking across a crowded public square, 100 drones maneuver through the night sky in Hungary's capital, the result of over a decade of research and experimentation that scientists believe could change the future of unmanned fli
item.dc:creator: JUSTIN SPIKE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Apple updates its IT training courses for latest OS updates
item.description: Apple has updated an essential enterprise product — its IT training courses, which have now been updated for the latest iterations of its operating systems, iOS 18, iPadOS 18, and macOS Sequoia.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Musk and Trump are viewed roughly the same by Americans, an AP-NORC poll finds
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Elon Musk, clad in tuxedo and black tie, took the stage at President-elect Donald Trump's Mar-a-Lago resort shortly after the election with all the swagger of the winning candidate himself. “The public has given us a mandate that could not be more clear, the clearest mandate.
item.dc:creator: THOMAS BEAUMONT, SARAH PARVINI and AMELIA THOMSON-DEVEAUX, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Anti-deepfake porn bill included in funding deal
item.description: A bill that seeks to fight the rise of deepfake pornography was included in the year-end government funding deal unveiled Tuesday, raising the prospect the legislation could cross the finish line in the coming days.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: EPA grants California authority to ban sales of new gas cars by 2035. Action faces reversal by Trump
item.description: The California rule is stricter than a federal rule adopted this year that tightens emissions standards but does not require sales of electric vehicles.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: The teaser for the actual Superman movie trailer is here, and James Gunn's first DCU movie will make you believe that a man can fly
item.description: Ahead of the Superman movie trailer's official debut on December 19, a 30-second video has teased what to expect from the DCU film.
item.dc:creator: tom.power@futurenet.com (Tom Power), TechRadar

item.title: Rust Programming Language: Essential Concepts for Developers
item.description: Rust programming language: Key concepts for developers, including immutability, ownership, borrow checking, and backward-compatibility in Rust editions.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: You have a license to code
item.description: One of the coolest things about software development is that you don’t need anyone’s permission to do it. If you need an application for your business or personal use, there isn’t a single thing stopping you from learning to code and writing it yourself.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: The latest twist in the embarrassing WordPress saga involves pineapple pizza
item.description: The drama at WordPress has taken a number of twists and turns in the months since Matt Mullenweg, founder and CEO of for-profit WordPress host Automattic, shut off access to WP Engine, a third-party platform that many users deploy to host their websites.
item.dc:creator: Chris Stokel-Walker, Fast Company

item.title: EU investigates TikTok over Romanian presidential election safeguards
item.description: LONDON (AP) — European Union regulators said Tuesday they're investigating whether TikTok breached the bloc's digital rulebook by failing to deal with risks to Romania's presidential election, which has been thrown into turmoil over allegations of electoral violations and Russian meddling.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: US moves to tighten restrictions on China Telecom amid security fears
item.description: The US Commerce Department is intensifying its actions against China Telecom’s US unit over concerns that its cloud and internet services could be used to funnel American data to Beijing, according to a Reuters report.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: JavaScript is still number one – JetBrains report
item.description: JavaScript is the most-used programming language, according to JetBrains’ State of Developer Ecosystem Report 2024. But the languages with the most promising growth prospects are TypeScript, Rust, and Python, the report says.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: How to contact the Rhode Island cyberattack call center after data breach
item.description: Rhode Island officials urged residents to take immediate steps to protect themselves on Saturday, warning that the hackers could release personal data.
item.dc:creator: Leah Crowley, NewsNation

item.title: CISA lays out how agencies, industry should respond to major cyber incidents
item.description: The draft national cyber incident response plan comes eight years after the last update, and more than six years after the creation of CISA itself. The post CISA lays out how agencies, industry should respond to major cyber incidents first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Senate report alleges Amazon rejected warehouse safety recommendations due to productivity concerns
item.description: At least two internal Amazon studies found a link between how quickly the online retailer's warehouse workers perform tasks and workplace injuries, but the company rejected many safety recommendations out of concern the proposed changes might reduce productivity, according to a U.S.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: How to factory reset your Android
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson reveals how to securely back up and factory reset your Android to protect your privacy and data.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: What IT hiring looks like heading into 2025
item.description: Despite low unemployment in the IT industry, IT hiring has slowed over the past two years and is expected to plateau in 2025 as employers prioritize experienced candidates with specialized skills, according to three new studies.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: 4 steps to streamline enterprise cloud spending
item.description: The proliferation of cloud computing has fundamentally reshaped how enterprises handle their critical workloads, transforming the cloud into a strategic tool and business enabler.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Court denies TikTok's request to halt enforcement of potential US ban until Supreme Court review
item.description: A federal appeals court on Friday left in place a mid-January deadline in a federal law requiring TikTok to be sold or face a ban in the United States, rejecting a request made by the company to halt enforcement until the Supreme Court reviews its challenge of the statute.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: 12 easy, techy ways to make the holiday smoother
item.description: To make the busiest time of year more manageable, here are some tricks for tracking your packages, taking quality family photos and curating the perfect Christmas playlist.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
